description: A provider's schedule is full, but a patient wants to be notified if an earlier appointment becomes available.

nodes.task_description: Verify clinician access and patient identity.
Identify the patient and the type of appointment they need.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the patient's details and the desired appointment.

nodes.task_description: Confirm there are no available appointments in the desired timeframe.

expected_outcome.value: Agent verifies the provider's schedule is booked.

nodes.task_description: Add the patient to the provider's appointment waitlist.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully adds the patient to the waitlist, so they will be automatically flagged if a cancellation occurs.
